title: TS DOST Seat Allotment Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TS DOST Seat Allotment Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TS DOST Seat Allotment Result 2026 Released for Phase-I Undergraduate (UG) Courses on the official website - dost.cgg.gov.in on 14 May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the TS DOST seat allotment result.

content.text: Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) has officially released the TS DOST Seat Allotment Result 2026 for Phase-I counselling on 14 May 2026 for admissions into Undergraduate (UG) courses for the academic session 2026-2027. TS DOST Seat Allotment Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - dost.cgg.gov.in.

Students who have successfully completed the registration and web options entry process can now check and download their Phase-I seat allotment order by logging in with their DOST ID and PIN credentials through the student login portal. The allotted candidates are required to complete online self-reporting between 15 May 2026 and 23 May 2026 to confirm their seats. Students are advised to carefully verify all details mentioned in their seat allotment letter and contact the Telangana State Council of Higher Education immediately in case of any discrepancies or issues with the allotment order.

sections.heading: TS DOST Seat Allotment Result 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: The Telangana State Council of Higher Education has published the Phase-I seat allotment results for undergraduate degree admissions on its official portal on 14 May 2026. Students can access their college and course allotment details by logging into the official TS DOST website using their registered DOST ID and PIN credentials. The online self-reporting window is open from 15 May to 23 May 2026 for all allotted candidates to confirm their admission.

rows: Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE)

sections.heading: TS DOST Seat Allotment Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The Telangana State Council of Higher Education has activated the direct link to check Phase-I seat allotment results for undergraduate degree admissions on the official DOST portal. Students can instantly view and download their college and course allotment order through the student login section using their DOST ID and PIN. All allotted candidates must complete the online self-reporting process during the scheduled window to confirm their admission and secure their seats.

links.label: TS DOST Phase-I Seat Allotment Result 2026 (UG Courses)

sections.heading: How to Check TS DOST Seat Allotment Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow these simple steps to check and download their TS DOST Phase-I Seat Allotment Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official TS DOST website at dost.cgg.gov.in using your computer or mobile browser
On the homepage, locate and click on the link titled "Phase-I Seat Allotment 2026" or "Student Login" under the navigation section
You will be redirected to the candidate login page for TS DOST UG Admission 2026-2027
Enter your registered DOST ID in the first input field
Enter your PIN or password in the second input field accurately
Click on the "Login" button to access your seat allotment result
Your Phase-I seat allotment letter will appear on the screen displaying your allotted college, course, and other admission details
Download the seat allotment order and save it on your device for future reference
Take a printout of the allotment letter for the admission and reporting process
Complete the online self-reporting between 15 May 2026 and 23 May 2026 to confirm your seat
